notes: HOTFIX for mlxstudio#87 / #84 follow-up. v1.3.81 missed the 10-second subprocess-timeout pattern in sessions.ts::findEnginePath — on cold-disk first launch the bundled-Python verification probe timed out, fell through to the system-binary search, and spawned any stale user-installed vmlx-engine found at /opt/homebrew/bin or ~/.local/bin. That stale binary's Python frequently lacked vmlx_engine or jang_tools, producing 'ModuleNotFoundError' reports. Fixed: filesystem dist-info verification (shared with engine-manager.ts) + in packaged mode, never fall through to a system binary.
